scalars.name: nbrMainModule
scalars.description: Number of main module (path) in the unit.

scalars.name: nbrRedundantModule
scalars.description: Number of redundant module in the system.

scalars.name: priority
scalars.description: Set path priority for standby module.

scalars.name: initNoModules
scalars.description:
Always read 0.
				Write 1 to init the number of modules.

scalars.name: factoryDefault
scalars.description:
Always read 0.
				Write 1 to reset the unit to factory default and reboot.

scalars.name: reboot
scalars.description:
Always read 0.
				Write 1 to reboot the unit.

tables.name: pathSetModuleUseEntry
tables.description: Single system entry (conceptual row) in the path set module use table.

columns.name: pathSetMode
columns.description: Set mode to use on path.

columns.name: pathSetModuleUse
columns.description: Set module to use on path.

columns.name: pathSetGain
columns.description: Set gain (in hundredths of dBm) on path.

columns.name: pathSetSlope
columns.description: Set slope (in hundredths of dBm) on path.

columns.name: pathAttenuator1
columns.description: Set attenuator 1 (in hundredths of dBm) on path.

columns.name: pathAttenuator2
columns.description: Set attenuator 2 (in hundredths of dBm) on path.

columns.name: pathAttenuator3
columns.description: Set attenuator 3 (in hundredths of dBm) on path.

tables.name: hotColdRedundantModuleEntry
tables.description: Single system entry (conceptual row) in the hot cold redundant module table.

columns.name: hotColdRedundantModule
columns.description: Set redundant module to hot or cold.

tables.name: checkColdRedundantModuleEntry
tables.description: Single system entry (conceptual row) in the check cold redundant module table.

columns.name: checkColdRedundantModule
columns.description: Set check option for redundant module.

tables.name: blockConfigEntry
tables.description: Single system entry (conceptual row) in the block config table.

columns.name: nbrMainModuleBlock
columns.description: Number of main module (path) in the block.

columns.name: nbrRedundantModuleBlock
columns.description: Number of redundant module in the block.

columns.name: trackingBlock
columns.description: Set tracking on or off for the block.

tables.name: moduleSettingsEntry
tables.description: Single module entry (conceptual row) in the module settings table

columns.name: moduleSetLimits
columns.description:
Write 1 to set the monitoring limits on
				 selected module.

tables.name: chassisSettingsEntry
tables.description: Single module entry (conceptual row) in the module settings table

columns.name: chassisSetLimits
columns.description:
Write 1 to set the limits on
				 chassis.

tables.name: trapEntry
tables.description: Single trap entry (conceptual row) in the Trap receiver table

columns.name: trapEnabled
columns.description: Indicates if this trap entry is enabled or not.

columns.name: trapCommunity
columns.description: Trap community to be used by agent to send trap

tables.name: ipSettingsEntry
tables.description: Single entry (conceptual row) in the Input Settings Table

columns.name: ipIPAddress
columns.description:
A read/write IP address.  This is the address of the unit.
			Note: this object is only writeable if the ipDHCP object is set to
			disabled(0).
			Note: setting 'ipApplyReset' to '1' will be needed to apply new IP settings.

columns.name: ipSubnet
columns.description:
A read/write subnet mask.  This is the subnet mask of the unit.
			Note: this object is only writeable if the ipDHCP object is set to
			disabled(0).
			Note: setting 'ipApplyReset' to '1' will be needed to apply new IP settings.

columns.name: ipGateway
columns.description:
A read/write gateway IP Address. 
			Note: this object is only writeable if the ipDHCP object is set to
			disabled(0).
			Note: setting 'ipApplyReset' to '1' will be needed to apply new IP settings.

columns.name: ipApplyReset
columns.description:
Write 1 to apply IP settings.
				Write 0 to reset IP settings to current IP settings.

tables.name: pathModuleUsedEntry
tables.description: Single system entry (conceptual row) in the path module used table.

tables.name: lastCheckRedundantModuleEntry
tables.description: Single system entry (conceptual row) in the last check redundant module table.

columns.name: lastCheckRedundantModule
columns.description: Seconds since last check of redundant module.

tables.name: moduleReadingsEntry
tables.description: Single module entry (conceptual row) in the module reading table

columns.name: moduleAmp2Voltage
columns.description: Amp2 measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: moduleAmp3VoltageCurrent
columns.description:
Amp3 measured voltage in tenths of Volt
			or current in mA

columns.name: moduleAmp4VoltageCurrent
columns.description:
Amp4 measured voltage in tenths of Volt
			or current in mA

columns.name: moduleAmp5VoltageCurrent
columns.description:
Amp5 measured voltage in tenths of Volt
			or current in mA

columns.name: moduleAmp6Voltage
columns.description: Amp6 measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: moduleCommunication
columns.description:
Status of module communication.
			Other module data is only valid if moduleCommunication reads as OK.

columns.name: moduleLnbVoltage
columns.description: LNB voltage measured current in mV

columns.name: module65vVoltage
columns.description: 6.5V measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: module5vVoltage
columns.description: 5V measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: moduleTemperature
columns.description:
Module temperature in tenths of degrees C,
			i.e. a reading of 375 is 37.5 degrees C

columns.name: moduleSwitchingPositionStatus
columns.description: Status of switching position on switch board

columns.name: moduleTemperature2
columns.description:
Module temperature 2 in tenths of degrees C,
			i.e. a reading of 375 is 37.5 degrees C

columns.name: moduleNeg2vVoltage
columns.description: -2V measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: moduleNeg5vVoltage
columns.description: -5V measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: module12v5Voltage
columns.description: 12.5V measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: module15vVoltage
columns.description: 15V measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: module12vVoltage
columns.description: 12V measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: moduleAmp1Temperature
columns.description:
Amp1 temperature in tenths of degrees C,
			i.e. a reading of 375 is 37.5 degrees C

columns.name: moduleAmp2Temperature
columns.description:
Amp2 temperature in tenths of degrees C,
			i.e. a reading of 375 is 37.5 degrees C

columns.name: moduleSummary
columns.description:
Module summary status.
			This status is valid only if moduleCommunication reads OK.

columns.name: moduleAmp1Voltage
columns.description: Amp1 measured voltage in tenths of Volt

tables.name: chassisReadingsEntry
tables.description: Single chassis entry (conceptual row) in the chassis reading table

columns.name: chassis65vVoltage
columns.description: 6.5V measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: chassis5vVoltage
columns.description: 5V measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: chassisTemperature
columns.description:
Chassis temperature in tenths of degrees C,
			i.e. a reading of 375 is 37.5 degrees C

columns.name: chassis65vVoltage2
columns.description: 6.5V PSU 2 measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: chassisPsu1Voltage
columns.description: PSU 1 measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: chassis3vBusVoltage
columns.description: 3V BUS measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: chassisPsu2Voltage
columns.description: PSU 2 measured voltage in tenths of Volt

columns.name: chassisVbusVoltage
columns.description: VBUS measured voltage in tenths of Volt
